description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches pip files at $HOME/.cache/pip keyed by $CI_PROJECT_NAME, defines ADVERTISED_HOST, ADVERTISED_PORT, AUTO_CREATE_TOPICS and POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD variables, and includes the review, precommit, publish-gitlab-release and publish-to-pypi components with their rule sets. In the test stage add a test:docs job using the python 3.14 image (registry.gitlab.com/thelabnyc/python:3.14@sha256:ddb71bc5cd982178418dc0186804796b0780b552d815ed5213bd520110b35103) that runs "uv sync" then "make docs" and only runs on merge request events. Also in the test stage add a test:lib job that runs in parallel across python images 3.11, 3.12, 3.13 and 3.14 (using registry.gitlab.com/thelabnyc/python:${IMAGE}), sets TOX_SKIP_ENV per matrix, runs "uv sync" and "uv run tox", captures coverage with the regex /^TOTAL.+?(\d+\%)$/ and triggers on protected branches, protected tags or merge request events. In the release stage add a pages job that needs test:lib, uses the same python 3.14 image, runs "uv sync" and "make docs", publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and only runs when the pipeline is on the default protected branch. All jobs have access to the spotify/kafka and postgres:latest services.
